In that role he brings a data analytics
perspective to the investment decisions for
Iowa’s highway network. Matt has been
working in the field of data analytics for over
20 years. After earning a BS in Statistics, he
started his career as a consultant in the field
of market research. Matt was able to
continue his education while consulting, and
earned an MBA early in his career. After
leaving the consulting world, he took on the
role of Chief Statistician for the Iowa
joining the Iowa DOT in 2010, he has had

he also consults in the field of data analytics,

Since I only do my own taxes, I don’t think I
can appreciate the complexities that the tax
folks among us must be dealing with this
year with all of the changes. Good luck to
our members who are deep into taxes. April
15 will be here before you know it.
